properties.name: Chonburi Old Town
properties.nameTh: ย่านเก่าเมืองชลบุรี
properties.describe: 19th–early 20th century Chinese-Thai shophouse district along the waterfront. Pre-war commercial heritage: narrow 2-3 storey shop-houses, Teochew merchant architecture, Buddhist shrines and Chinese clan houses.

properties.name: Wat Yai Intharam
properties.nameTh: วัดใหญ่อินทาราม
properties.describe: One of Chonburi's oldest and most revered temples. The main prang dates to the Ayutthaya period. Home to important Buddha images and royal connections.

properties.name: Wat Tham Suea
properties.nameTh: วัดถ้ำเสือ
properties.describe: Tiger Cave Temple — built into a limestone cliff face. Large Buddha image visible from the bay. Landmark for fishing boats returning to port.

properties.name: Wat Srimuang
properties.nameTh: วัดศรีเมือง
properties.describe: Central city temple, near the old town market. Community centre for Bang Pla Soi district. Houses important Rattanakosin-era murals.

properties.name: Wat Non Ket Yai
properties.nameTh: วัดหนองเกตุใหญ่
properties.describe: Large urban temple, eastern quarter. Well-known for its annual boat racing festival on the canal.

properties.name: Wat Ang Sila
properties.nameTh: วัดอ่างศิลา
properties.describe: Ang Sila fishing village temple. Blessing ceremonies for fishermen before the monsoon season. Mortar-and-pestle market nearby.

properties.name: San Chao Pho Khao Yai
properties.nameTh: ศาลเจ้าพ่อเขาใหญ่
properties.describe: Principal Chinese Teochew shrine serving the old merchant community. Boat festival rituals. The spiritual anchor of the old town waterfront.

properties.name: Chao Por Khao Yai (Bang Saen)
properties.nameTh: เทพเจ้าพ่อเขาใหญ่ บ้านแสน
properties.describe: Community shrine for Bang Saen fishing families. Lunar New Year ceremonies.
